name: That Good Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar with tight-fitting lid, combine oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper. Cover and shake well.
2. Chill the dressing.
3. In a bowl, toss romaine, tomatoes, Swiss cheese, almonds (if desired), Parmesan cheese, and bacon.
4. Shake the dressing and pour over the salad.
5. Toss everything together.
6. Add croutons and serve immediately.
Yield: 14 servings.
